title: Duplicate workdocs on mobile
excerpt: Ability to duplicate an existing workdoc on mobile devices.

posts.author: evanovich (Evan)
posts.cookedHtml: Ability to duplicate an existing workdoc on mobile devices.

posts.author: Steele69 (Noah Steele)
posts.cookedHtml: Amazon WorkDocs stores your files in the cloud , and you work with your files in a browser, or in the Amazon WorkDocs mobile app.
